text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Nooo! That one fell into a sea of lava!
choice_data_list: I didn't know the stakes were that high!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Did you see her face? So stoic, up until the very
end...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... The rest of us survivors will just have to
endure and live on...
